critical_code_review_comments: CheckoutSuccessPage.js: Mobile-first responsive design correctly implemented with md: breakpoint classes
CheckoutSuccessPage.js: Mobile header with Home icon (data-testid='mobile-home-btn') working correctly
CheckoutSuccessPage.js: Desktop header wrapped in 'hidden md:block' - correctly hidden on mobile
CheckoutSuccessPage.js: Footer wrapped in 'hidden md:block' - correctly hidden on mobile
CheckoutSuccessPage.js: Buttons use 'flex flex-col md:flex-row' for stacked mobile / horizontal desktop layout
CheckoutSuccessPage.js: Payment states (checking, success, error, timeout) all have compact mobile design with p-6 md:p-8
StoresListPage.js: Mobile search input has rounded-full class for circular design
StoresListPage.js: Filter toggle button (data-testid='mobile-filter-toggle') with ChevronDown icon working
StoresListPage.js: Collapsible filter panel with animate-in slide-in-from-top-2 animation
StoresListPage.js: View mode toggle shows icon only on mobile (text has 'hidden md:inline')
StoresListPage.js: Store grid uses 'grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-5' for responsive columns
StoresListPage.js: Desktop filters bar has 'hidden md:block sticky top-0 z-40' for sticky horizontal layout
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 verified CheckoutSuccessPage and StoresListPage responsive design. Key findings: 1) CheckoutSuccessPage has mobile header with Home icon and 'Procesando' title. 2) Payment states (checking, success, error) all have compact mobile design. 3) Buttons stack vertically on mobile, horizontal on desktop. 4) Footer hidden on mobile. 5) StoresListPage has collapsible filters on mobile with toggle button. 6) Search input is circular (rounded-full) on mobile. 7) View mode toggle shows only icon on mobile, text on desktop. 8) Store grid is 2 columns on mobile, 5 columns on desktop (xl). 9) Desktop filters bar is sticky horizontal layout.

mobile_390px.header: WORKING - Mobile header with Home icon and 'Procesando' title

desktop_1920px.buttons: WORKING - Horizontal row with md:flex-row, md:h-11 height
